message: bd-sowt: rebase access predictor touch counter

files.patch:
@@ -773,6 +773,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-sf6w","title":"Bitmap CRC: verify kernel bitmap pre-processing before checksumming","description":"Read the Linux kernel source for ext4_block_bitmap_csum_set() and ext4_block_bitmap_csum_verify() to determine:
(a) Whether the kernel zeroes unused tail bits in the bitmap before checksumming. For a group with fewer blocks than blocks_per_group, the tail bits may be set to 1 (indicating 'used') by mkfs but the kernel may ignore/zero them before CRC.
(b) Whether the kernel checksums exactly block_size bytes or clusters_per_group/8 bytes. Our code checksums the full block.
(c) Whether the kernel XORs or masks any fields in the group descriptor before storing the checksum.

SPECIFIC FILES TO CHECK:
- fs/ext4/balloc.c: ext4_block_bitmap_csum_set(), ext4_block_bitmap_csum_verify()
- fs/ext4/bitmap.c: ext4_bitmap_csum()
- include/linux/ext4.h: struct ext4_group_desc layout

ACCEPTANCE: Document the exact kernel pre-processing steps. If any differ from our implementation, fix our code.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:07:25.650024112Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:25:28.787877259Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T03:25:28.787389015Z","close_reason":"Kernel source confirmed: no group number in bitmap CRC, length is clusters_per_group/8 for blocks and inodes_per_group/8 for inodes. Fixed in commit 20d65f4.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["crc32c","ext4","investigation"]}
 {"id":"bd-sfb9","title":"Add proptest property-based tests for ffs-fuse","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-25T08:04:17.207361401Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T08:33:52.078831108Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T08:33:52.078801833Z","close_reason":"Added 33 proptest property-based tests covering inode routing, xattr reply classification, setxattr mode parsing, xattr name encoding, AccessPredictor bounds/eviction, ReadaheadManager insert/take/eviction, AtomicMetrics consistency, MountOptions resolution, PerCoreConfig/PerCoreDispatcher routing/metrics, CoreMetrics hit rate, and imbalance ratio. All 120 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["testing"]}
 {"id":"bd-sik","title":"ffs-types: Checked arithmetic + alignment helpers (block math, offsets)","description":"Goal: centralize all tricky integer math used by on-disk parsing and block mapping.

Deliverables:
- checked_add_bytes(offset, len) -> ByteOffset end
- checked_mul_block(block_nr, block_size) -> ByteOffset
- align_down/align_up helpers with overflow checking
- conversions with explicit error paths (no silent truncation)

Acceptance:
- Unit tests cover overflow/edge cases.
- Call sites in ffs-block/ffs-ondisk/ffs-core prefer these helpers over ad-hoc math.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AzureBeaver","created_at":"2026-02-10T03:14:24.565357285Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T08:41:43.432870696Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T08:41:43.432852562Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["foundation"]}
+{"id":"bd-sowt","title":"AccessPredictor touch counter overflow breaks LRU eviction","description":"AccessPredictor::record_read uses a saturating touch counter; once it hits u64::MAX, LRU keys collide and eviction stops, letting history grow beyond max_entries. Add a rebase of touch values on overflow and a regression test.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-11T19:29:54.282450212Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-11T19:32:50.330133018Z","closed_at":"2026-04-11T19:32:50.329943950Z","close_reason":"Completed: rebase AccessPredictor touch counter on overflow","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-spik","title":"Implement 6 parity features: btrfs decompression, ext4 inline/indirect/bigalloc/ZERO_RANGE, btrfs subvol","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-22T22:57:08.050698719Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-22T22:57:23.369345832Z","closed_at":"2026-03-22T22:57:23.368707223Z","close_reason":"Full parity session: implemented 6 new filesystem features to close gaps between FrankenFS and real ext4/btrfs images:

1. btrfs transparent decompression (ZLIB + ZSTD) — compressed extents now readable
2. ext4 inline data read — EXT4_INLINE_DATA_FL files now readable from inode body + xattr
3. ext4 indirect block addressing — pre-extent inodes with direct/indirect/double/triple pointers
4. ext4 bigalloc infrastructure — cluster_ratio field in FsGeometry
5. ext4 FALLOC_FL_ZERO_RANGE — new fallocate mode for zeroing allocated ranges
6. btrfs subvolume mount — configurable subvol_objectid in BtrfsContext

Also fixed during review: compressed extent size overflow, decompressed length validation, inline data xattr parsing (use parse_ibody_xattrs instead of naive offset skip).

Updated FEATURE_PARITY.md: 80/80 tracked features (was 75/75).
473 ffs-core tests pass. All leaf crates clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity"]}
 {"id":"bd-t426","title":"ffs-inode: harden delete_inode xattr-block paths and edge cases","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-25T21:45:18.521220541Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T21:58:24.525639828Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T21:58:24.525618528Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-t6h9","title":"Implement btrfs LZO decompression","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-22T23:43:54.911362121Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-22T23:58:26.436885896Z","closed_at":"2026-03-22T23:58:26.436209759Z","close_reason":"Implemented btrfs LZO decompression with segment framing. Added lzokay-native crate for pure-Rust LZO1X decompression. btrfs_decompress type 2 now parses the btrfs LZO frame format (total_len header + per-page segments) and decompresses each segment. All 3 btrfs compression codecs (ZLIB/LZO/ZSTD) now supported in the read path. 472 tests pass (2 pre-existing btrfs log contract failures).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["btrfs","compression","parity"]}
